title: onosma helvetica subsp. fallax
intro: Onosma helvetica subsp. fallax, commonly known as the false alpine onosma, is a plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of inflammation and skin conditions, due to the presence of bioactive compounds such as alkaloids and saponins. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of eczema, acne, and other skin irritations. The herbal preparations of Onosma helvetica subsp. fallax can be found in the form of tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically to soothe and calm the skin.
